title: Teacher misconduct panel outcome: Mr Antony Hutchinson
body: "The Secretary of State does not make these decisions themselves. They are made by a senior official on the recommendation of an independent panel.  Teacher’s name: Mr Antony Hutchinson  Location teacher worked: Weymouth, South West England.  Date of professional conduct panel: 10 March 2025 to 12 March 2025  Outcome type: no order made  Notice is hereby given that, in accordance with The Teachers’ Disciplinary (England) Regulations 2012, a professional conduct panel was convened to consider the case of Mr Antony Hutchinson, formerly employed in Weymouth, South West England. "
